reference: I am a nineteen-year-old girl. I am not very dark, but I am not very fair either. I have dark circles and I want my complexion to be fair. Please suggest some affordable capsules that would make me fair forever with no side effects. My fiancé has a fair complexion, so I feel self-conscious about it. I also want fair, bright, smooth, and glowing skin, please.
text: I'm not doing well at all. I'm not really sure why I'm not okay. I trust the things my mom and question people say, I just wish they would talk to me instead of acting like I'm doing something bad. My therapist says depression, so I think I'll talk to her. That also makes me feel sleepy.
